data.title: Goldman Sachs Revises U.S. March Core PCE Inflation Estimate
data.description:
Goldman Sachs has revised its estimate for the U.S. March core Personal Consumption Expenditures (PCE) price index following the release of the March Producer Price Index (PPI) data. According to Jin10, the March PPI, excluding food and energy, and the PPI excluding food, energy, and trade services, were all lower than expected. However, the PPI component related to PCE outperformed Goldman Sachs' previous assumptions.

Based on the details from the PPI and Consumer Price Index (CPI) reports, Goldman Sachs now estimates that the U.S. March core PCE price index rose by 0.27%, compared to their earlier forecast of 0.22% before the PPI report was released. This adjustment corresponds to a year-over-year increase of 3.15% for the core PCE.

Additionally, Goldman Sachs projects that the overall PCE price index for March increased by 0.64%, with a year-over-year rise of 3.45%.

data.title: Anthropic introduces the Claude authentication mechanism for abuse prevention and compliance review.
data.description: Anthropic has implemented an identity verification mechanism in some use cases of Claude to prevent abuse, enforce usage policies, and fulfill legal obligations. This process, powered by Persona, requires users to submit a government-issued photo ID and may involve real-time selfie verification. Anthropic states that the verification data is used solely for identity verification and is not used for model training, marketing, or advertising. If verification fails, users can retry multiple times within the process or submit a form for manual assistance. Accounts may be banned for repeated violations of usage policies, terms of service, registration from unsupported regions, or use by users under the age of 18.

data.title: Analysts: The average price held by US Bitcoin ETF holders is $74,000.
data.description: Analyst Axel Adler Jr wrote on the X platform that the average entry price for US Bitcoin ETF holders is $74,000, and BTC has already reached that price level. Its performance here will determine the next step.

data.title: Goldman Sachs: Risk premium at the front end of the oil curve has declined.
data.description: Goldman Sachs analysts stated, "Since the US-Iran ceasefire declaration, the risk premium at the front end of the oil curve has declined as the likelihood of a peace agreement in the near term has increased." Goldman Sachs noted that oil flows through the Strait of Hormuz have not yet increased, and the US blockade could further squeeze supply. However, this pressure has been somewhat alleviated because the disruption to crude oil production in the Middle East does not appear to be as severe as expected, thanks to larger-than-expected storage capacity both onshore and offshore. (Jinshi)

data.title: France's March CPI Revised Upward Amid Energy Price Surge Due to Iran Conflict
data.description: France's March CPI final figures exceeded initial estimates, driven by a significant increase in energy prices due to the ongoing conflict in Iran. According to Jin10, data released on Wednesday showed that France's harmonized CPI rose by 2% year-on-year in March, surpassing the preliminary figure of 1.9%. While this increase aligns with the European Central Bank's target, Spain's March CPI also saw an upward revision, with the final figure at 3.4%, higher than the initial estimate of 3.3%.

data.title: PHANTOMPULSE Trojan Delivered via Obsidian Plugin Exploit
data.description: Elastic Security Labs has revealed that attackers utilized the Shell Commands plugin in Obsidian to deploy the PHANTOMPULSE trojan through a compromised note vault. According to NS3.AI, Elastic clarified that the attack did not exploit any vulnerability within Obsidian itself. Instead, the Windows payload leveraged Ethereum transaction data for command-and-control communication.

data.title: Binance Introduces New Yield Arena Offers with Flexible and Locked Products
data.description:
According to the announcement from Binance, the platform has unveiled new offerings in its Yield Arena, providing users with opportunities to earn rewards through various financial products. These offerings include Simple Earn, ETH Staking, SOL Staking, and Dual Investment, each with specific terms and conditions.

**Earn Spotlight Limited-Time Offers**

Eligible users holding at least 0.01 USDe for 24 hours can earn 3.5% APR rewards from 2026-04-10 00:00 (UTC) to 2026-04-15 23:59 (UTC). Simple Earn subscribers to RLUSD Flexible Products can enjoy up to 8% APR, including exclusive Bonus Tiered APR, from 2026-04-14 00:00:00 (UTC) to 2026-04-27 23:59:59 (UTC). Dual Investment participants can earn up to $8,888 in rewards from 2026-04-01 02:00 (UTC) to 2026-04-30 23:59 (UTC).

**Product Offerings**

Flexible Products include USDT, USDC, RLUSD, ETH, SOL, KGST, and SXT, each with varying APRs and subscription limits. Locked Products feature NXPC, USDS, VET, ETH, BNB, and SOL, with durations ranging from 30 to 120 days and APRs up to 5.5%. ETH and SOL Staking offer dynamic APRs, while Dual Investment provides high-yield opportunities with multiple settlement dates.

**Additional Information**

Binance reserves the right to adjust APRs without prior notice, and offers are available on a first-come, first-served basis. Users can redeem assets early in Simple Earn Locked Products, with principal returns subject to interest deductions. Global time zone differences may delay token receipt by up to 72 hours. Users holding BNB Flexible or Locked Products automatically receive Launchpool rewards and may qualify for Megadrop rewards. BNB Simple Earn subscribers can also receive airdropped tokens via HODLer Airdrops.

data.title: Virginia Governor Signs Bill on Unclaimed Crypto Assets
data.description:
Virginia Governor Abigail Spanberger signed House Bill 798 into law on Monday. According to Foresight News, the legislation will take effect on July 1, 2026, and mandates that unclaimed crypto assets in customer accounts, defined as assets unclaimed for five years, be transferred to state custody in their original form. This means the actual tokens will be moved without immediate liquidation or conversion to cash.

Historically, state administrators have often liquidated unclaimed crypto assets shortly after transferring them to state custody. This practice could result in owners receiving cash at earlier, potentially lower market prices when they later claim their assets. The new law allows state government administrators to hold unclaimed digital assets in their original form and requires these assets to be held for at least one year before liquidation.

data.title: Russian Foreign Minister Asserts Iran's Right to Uranium Enrichment
data.description: Russia's Foreign Minister has emphasized that uranium enrichment is an undeniable right of Iran. According to Odaily, he noted that the Middle East crisis is unlikely to be resolved in the short term, and efforts to 'resolve' the crisis will be futile.

data.title: Russian Foreign Minister: The Middle East crisis will not be resolved in the short term.
data.description: The Russian Foreign Minister stated that uranium enrichment is Iran's indisputable right. The Middle East crisis will not be resolved in the short term, and efforts to "resolve" the crisis will be fruitless. (Solid Intel)

data.title: Ethereum's Weekly MACD Indicates Potential Bullish Momentum
data.description:
On April 15, Ethereum's weekly MACD is reportedly forming a golden cross pattern, according to BlockBeats. Analyst Alicharts notes that in the past three instances of Ethereum's weekly MACD golden cross, ETH prices increased by 130%, 74%, and 98% respectively.

It is important to highlight that while a MACD golden cross is often seen as a signal of strengthening momentum, historical performance does not guarantee future outcomes. A comprehensive analysis should consider the macroeconomic environment and overall market sentiment.

data.title: Citrea's Technical Milestone: Focus Shifts to User Acquisition
data.description: Citrea has successfully demonstrated its technical prowess, according to Tiger Research. The Bitcoin Layer 2 project has validated its zero-knowledge technology by launching a live mainnet that utilizes BitVM for direct verification by the Bitcoin mainnet. According to NS3.AI, the next step for Citrea is to concentrate on expanding its user base.

data.title: Hackers used the Obsidian plugin to launch the PHANTOMPULSE Trojan.
data.description: According to Elastic Security Labs, threat actors impersonated venture capital firms, luring targets to open Obsidian notes containing malicious code via LinkedIn and Telegram. This attack exploited Obsidian's Shell Commands plugin, executing the malicious payload without exploiting vulnerabilities when the victim opened the notes library. The attack discovered PHANTOMPULSE, a previously undocumented Windows Remote Access Trojan (RAT), enabled blockchain C2 communication via Ethereum transaction data. The macOS payload used an obfuscated AppleScript delivery tool and a Telegram channel as a backup C2. Elastic Defend detected and blocked the attack before PHANTOMPULSE could execute.

data.title: Societe Generale-FORGE Expands USD CoinVertible Access via MetaMask Partnership
data.description: Societe Generale-FORGE has partnered with Consensys to make its USD CoinVertible stablecoin accessible to millions of MetaMask users. According to NS3.AI, this collaboration allows the bank's dollar-denominated token to be integrated into self-custodial crypto wallets. Societe Generale-FORGE, the digital asset division of Societe Generale SA, aims to enhance the reach and usability of its stablecoin through this strategic move.

data.title: First Digital Partners with Singapore Gulf Bank to Enhance FDUSD Infrastructure
data.description: First Digital has announced a partnership with Singapore Gulf Bank to strengthen the institutional banking infrastructure for FDUSD. According to Foresight News, the collaboration aims to achieve near real-time settlement, optimize liquidity management, and reduce operational friction through SGB's dedicated stablecoin banking layer.

data.title: New Social Engineering Attack Targets Crypto and Finance Users
data.description: A new social engineering attack has been identified, targeting users in the cryptocurrency and finance sectors. According to PANews, Elastic Security Labs discovered that attackers are exploiting the community plugin feature of the note-taking application Obsidian to distribute malware capable of controlling victims' devices. The attackers employ sophisticated social engineering tactics via LinkedIn and Telegram, posing as venture capital firms. They create a business context centered around financial services, particularly cryptocurrency liquidity solutions, to lure victims into opening a cloud-hosted library controlled by the attackers in Obsidian and enabling community plugin synchronization. The malicious plugin then silently executes the attack chain.

data.title: Zerion disclosed that it was attacked by North Korean hackers using AI for social engineering, resulting in the theft of approximately $100,000.
data.description: Crypto wallet Zerion disclosed that North Korean hackers used AI in a long-term social engineering attack, stealing approximately $100,000 from the company's hot wallet last week. Zerion confirmed that user funds, applications, and infrastructure were unaffected and has proactively disabled its web application as a precaution. Zerion also stated that the attackers obtained login sessions and credentials of some team members, as well as the company's hot wallet private key, noting that AI is changing the way cyber threats operate. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: SIX Group to Offer Onchain Stock Market Data via Chainlink Nodes
data.description: European stock exchange operator SIX Group is set to provide stock market data onchain through Chainlink nodes. According to NS3.AI, this integration aims to cater to the tokenized asset market by enabling blockchain developers to create financial products using institutional-grade data.

data.title: Hanwha Investment & Securities Advances Digital Asset Strategy
data.description: Hanwha Investment & Securities is taking steps to specialize in digital assets. According to NS3.AI, the company has proposed a 'Hanwha TradFi' infrastructure and is actively recruiting Web3 professionals to form a dedicated team.

data.title: Ripple CEO Highlights Progress in U.S. Crypto Regulation
data.description: Ripple CEO Brad Garlinghouse recently celebrated his 11th anniversary at the company by noting advancements in U.S. cryptocurrency regulation. According to NS3.AI, Garlinghouse highlighted that XRP has been officially recognized as a commodity rather than a security by U.S. regulators. Despite this progress, he emphasized the need for lawmakers to enact a comprehensive crypto market structure bill to further clarify and support the industry.
